title: Shift Workers and Adrenal Fatigue: 10 Herbal Cream Remedies
description: Lavandula angustifolia creams have been found to help alleviate symptoms of adrenal fatigue due to their unique properties and constituents. This plant, also known as English lavender, contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate, which have been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system and promote relaxation.
